title: Trim Abilitys
description: All the armor trims get custom abilitys enabled with double clicking shift
body:
Bizarre SMP - Armor Trim Abilities Plugin

Transform your Minecraft server with unique armor trim-based abilities! This plugin adds 18 powerful active abilities that players can unlock by wearing complete armor sets with matching trims.

Key Features:

    Trim-Based Powers: Each armor trim pattern grants a unique ability when worn as a complete matching set
    Double-Tap Activation: Players activate abilities by double-tapping sneak (customizable timing)
    Balanced Cooldowns: 30-second cooldown prevents ability spam while maintaining tactical gameplay
    Fall Damage Protection: Abilities that launch players automatically negate fall damage
    Enhanced Grappling: Wild trim can attach to blocks, entities, AND wind charges for dynamic movement

Available Abilities:

    Wild: Grappling hook to blocks, entities, or wind charges
    Vex: High-speed forward dash with particle effects
    Spire: Powerful vertical leap
    Rib: Aerial slam attack with explosion damage
    Sentry: Create temporary defensive walls
    Tide: Water breathing + knockback wave
    Snout: Fire immunity + fire circle creation
    Eye: Night vision + reveal nearby entities
    Coast: Water-enhanced dash
    Dune: Sand blast projectile attack
    Ward: Invisibility + blinding smoke cloud
    Silence: Speed boost + enemy debuff with TNT
    Bolt: Teleport strike to target
    Flow: Pull enemies toward you
    Wayfinder: Speed and jump boost
    Raiser: Launch targets into the air
    Shaper: Extended invisibility + damage resistance
    Host: Trap enemies in cobwebs

Commands:

    /bizarre - Show help and commands
    /bizarre setdelay <ms> - Customize double-tap timing (100-1000ms)
    /bizarre book - Get the ability guide book

Perfect for PvP servers, survival multiplayer, or any server wanting to add strategic depth to combat and movement. Requires Paper/Spigot 1.21+.
